summary: Portfolio Commercial Features testing complete. All 11 requested features verified working correctly. Backend API tests (23/23 passed) and frontend UI tests (all scenarios passed).
critical_code_review_comments: Portfolio API correctly returns enhanced data structure with summary.annual_exposure, summary.annual_recoverable, summary.total_assets
Replication patterns correctly show asset-class breakdown with VaR per pattern
Repeatability signals correctly identify DRIFT as recurring (5 occurrences, 2 sites, 5 assets)
Scaled outcomes correctly calculate verified_savings * similar_assets_in_portfolio
Site drill-down correctly shows top 3 priorities per site with inline expansion
Collapse functionality works correctly - clicking expanded site card collapses drill-down
Operator mode unchanged - no portfolio elements visible, shows ranked priorities with WebSocket Live indicator
Admin mode correctly shows operator view (not portfolio view) since admin has both HOW and WHERE lenses
seed_data_creation: Demo seed endpoints /api/system/demo/first-five-minutes and /api/system/demo/seed-portfolio create multi-site data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Portfolio Commercial Features fully working. All 11 features verified: (A) Scale Banner with annual_exposure $222k, (B) Replication patterns with VaR per asset-class, (C) Repeatability signals showing DRIFT as Systemic, (D) Scaled outcomes projecting savings across similar assets, (E) Site drill-down with top 3 priorities inline. Operator/Admin modes unchanged.

portfolio_api_enhanced_data.details: Returns summary with annual_exposure, annual_recoverable, total_assets, replication patterns, repeatability signals, scaled_outcomes, per-site top_priorities

scale_banner_4_columns.details: Portfolio VaR ($608/day), Annual Exposure ($222k), Recoverable ($514/day), Portfolio (2 sites, 7 assets)

recurring_conditions_section.details: DRIFT condition: 5 occurrences, 2 sites, 5 assets, 'Systemic' badge

replication_opportunity_section.details: Asset-class breakdown with VaR per pattern

scalable_impact_section.details: Verified savings projected across similar assets (1.3 kWh → 1.3 kWh, 0.9 kWh/hr → 1.8 kWh/hr)

site_drilldown_warehouse.details: Cold Storage Compressor CRITICAL $340, Rooftop Unit 1 MEDIUM $55

site_drilldown_riverside.details: Main Air Compressor HIGH $151, Air Handling Unit 1 MEDIUM $43, Process Chiller 1 LOW $19

collapse_functionality.details: Clicking expanded site card collapses drill-down, 'View priorities' text returns

operator_mode_unchanged.details: No portfolio elements, shows ranked priorities with WebSocket Live indicator

admin_sees_operator_view.details: Admin sees operator view (not portfolio view) since has both HOW and WHERE lenses
